underlying_goal: Design and set up a scalable container/VM management system using argc framework and podman, with proper CLI structure, dynamic service discovery, and AI-agent-compatible interfaces
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly jumped to writing bash code despite explicit instructions to design first, produced buggy argc scripts, and failed to internalize the user's argc skill documentation and design-first methodology until very late in the session.
brief_summary: User wanted to design a scalable container management CLI using argc framework with a design-first approach, but Claude repeatedly wrote buggy bash instead of designing, frustrating the user significantly before partially converging on the right direction.
